description: A league has approved a new rule for the upcoming season. An administrator must ensure all officials and teams are aware of the change.

nodes.task_description: Update the official league rulebook with the new rule.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the digital rulebook.

nodes.task_description: Create a training module for referees explaining the new rule and how to enforce it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a video and text-based training module.

nodes.task_description: Send a formal memorandum to all teams and registered officials detailing the rule change.
